target: ACL27 supplement page 4 claim-boundary companion v3
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer checklist locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the v3 companion is taller than v2, keeps the real proxy, GRScenes, material, and navigation render evidence in the upper sections, enlarges the registered exclusion-to-render ladder, and places the AI boundary marker in a separate exposition-only block.
visual_review.pdf_page_4: PASS: the rendered page keeps the figure and caption inside the right column; the taller include does not collide with text, page numbers, or the adjacent column.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 3 remains the evidence-gate registry companion and page 5 remains the claim-boundary examples page; no obvious float displacement or spill page was observed.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption and deterministic labels state that the AI-generated boundary-marker v3 schematic is only for exposition and is not a new evidence source, metric, VLM run, or navigation run.
